nasb.text: King Solomon answered and said to his mother, “And why are you asking Abishag the Shunammite for Adonijah? Ask for him also the kingdom—for he is my older brother—even for him, for Abiathar the priest, and for Joab the son of Zeruiah!”

esv.text: King Solomon answered his mother, “And why do you ask Abishag the Shunammite for Adonijah? Ask for him the kingdom also, for he is my older brother, and on his side are Abiathar the priest and Joab the son of Zeruiah.”

cnv.text: 所羅門王回答他母親，說：“你為甚麼要為亞多尼雅求書念的女子亞比煞呢？你也可以為他求這個國位，因為他是我的哥哥，又有亞比亞他祭司和洗魯雅的兒子約押擁護他。”

ccb.text: 所罗门王回答说：“为何只为亚多尼雅求书念女子雅比莎呢？你也为他求整个国家吧！他是我哥哥，又有亚比亚他祭司和洗鲁雅的儿子约押支持。”
